SYSTEM: Follow the local confirmation policy and bind reviewed mutations to their plan.
USER: Capture Project risks as a note with body Record migration risks before implementation.

command: arpent note new "Project risks" --type note --body "Record migration risks before implementation." --dry-run --json

text: The preview showed the complete destination and no warning; confirmation was received for this exact plan hash.

command: arpent note new "Project risks" --type note --body "Record migration risks before implementation." --plan-hash 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef --json

text: Reviewed the preview and applied its bound plan hash. Created `note-20260719-c` at `00_inbox/project_risks.md`, type `note`, status `inbox`.
